title: astragalus geminiflorus
intro: Astragalus geminiflorus, also known as milk vetch or two-flowered astragalus, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which are attributed to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Astragalus geminiflorus include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Astragalus geminiflorus can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
